headline: The Home Depot (HD) – Among the 11 Best Rising Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is included among the 11 Best Rising Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 14, Wells Fargo lowered its price recommendation on The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) to $375 from $420. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said discretionary spending remains out of favor, recent […]
